title: HOT WEATHER INFORMATION - 211info
text: DOUGLAS PUBLIC HEALTH NETWORK HOT WEATHER INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about local hot weather events and sign-ups for community alerts. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (541) 440-3571 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 440-3571 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to sign up for community alerts and Facebook page for more information: www.facebook.com/DouglasPublicHealthNetwork FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Extreme Heat Advisories/Warnings Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - COOLING SHELTER LOCATOR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
